originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&codec_hw_write` is never used.

presenceCondition:
(and (= CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210 false)
     (= CONFIG_SND_FSI_AK4642 true)
     (= CONFIG_I2C true)
     (= CONFIG_SND_SOC_AK4642 true)
     (= CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210 false))
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_FSI_AK4642 () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210 () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_SOC_AK4642 () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_I2C () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210 () Bool
  false)
reasoning: Line 24: codec_hw_write dead store in ak4642_init() (SOC_AK4642=T, I2C=T). FSI_AK4642=T implies SOC_AK4642=T (consistent). No contradictions. New bug. Required: SOC_AK4642=T AND I2C=T. PC adds SOC_DA7210=F, FSI_DA7210=F unnecessarily. Over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_NEW_OVER.
